title: Coloring Game

notes: Game sometimes fails to start. When it does start, it crashes less than a minute in.
title: Coloring Game

notes: I was able to complete a puzzle before it crashed. None of the tweaks I tried seemed to make a difference as it still randomly crashes or fails to start entirely.
title: Coloring Game

notes:
After install, delete the contents of the "Coloring Game" folder. Then, open a terminal window and run the following to open the Console:
========================================================================================
steam steam://nav/console
========================================================================================
In the Steam console enter to download the 32bit client:
========================================================================================
download_depot 1026820 1026821
========================================================================================
Move the contents from the download location to the "Coloring Game" folder. Game updates will require downloading the 32bit client again.
